lines.speaker: Wizard Jalarast
lines.text: Hello there, can I help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you do here?

lines.speaker: Wizard Jalarast
lines.text: I've been studying the practice of making split-bark armour.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Split-bark armour, what's that?

lines.speaker: Wizard Jalarast
lines.text: Split-bark armour is special armour for mages. It's much more resistant to physical attacks than normal robes.

lines.speaker: Wizard Jalarast
lines.text: It's actually very easy for me to make, but I've been having trouble getting hold of the pieces.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well good luck with that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you make me some?

lines.speaker: Wizard Jalarast
lines.text: I'm sorry, but I can't do that right now.

lines.speaker: Wizard Jalarast
lines.text: I need bark from a hollow tree, and some fine cloth. Unfortunately both these items can only be found in Morytania, especially the cloth which is found in the tombs of shades.

lines.speaker: Wizard Jalarast
lines.text: Of course I'd happily sell you some at a discounted price if you bring me those items.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, guess I'll go looking then!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, how much do I need?

lines.speaker: Wizard Jalarast
lines.text: I need 1 piece of each for either gloves or boots, 2 pieces of each for a hat, 3 pieces of each for leggings, and 4 pieces of each for a top.

lines.speaker: Wizard Jalarast
lines.text: I'll charge you 1,000 coins for either gloves or boots, 6,000 coins for a hat, 32,000 coins for leggings, and 37,000 for a top.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, guess I'll go looking then!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's that you're wearing?

lines.speaker: Wizard Jalarast
lines.text: This is split-bark armour, it's special armour for mages. It's much more resistant to physical attacks than normal robes.

lines.speaker: Wizard Jalarast
lines.text: It's actually very easy for me to make, but I've been having trouble getting hold of the pieces.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you make me some armour please?

lines.speaker: Wizard Jalarast
lines.text: Certainly, what would you like me to make?

lines.speaker: Wizard Jalarast
lines.text: I'm sorry, but I can't do that right now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Wizard Jalarast
lines.text: I'm sorry, but I can't do that right now.

lines.speaker: Wizard Jalarast
lines.text: There you go, enjoy your new armour!

lines.speaker: Wizard Jalarast
lines.text: You need 2 pieces of bark, 2 pieces of fine cloth and 6,000 coins for a splitbark helm.

lines.speaker: Wizard Jalarast
lines.text: There you go, enjoy your new armour!

lines.speaker: Wizard Jalarast
lines.text: You need 4 pieces of bark, 4 pieces of fine cloth and 37,000 coins for a splitbark body.

lines.speaker: Wizard Jalarast
lines.text: There you go, enjoy your new armour!

lines.speaker: Wizard Jalarast
lines.text: You need 3 pieces of bark, 3 pieces of fine cloth and 32,000 coins for splitbark legs.

lines.speaker: Wizard Jalarast
lines.text: There you go, enjoy your new armour!

lines.speaker: Wizard Jalarast
lines.text: You need 1 piece of bark, 1 piece of fine cloth and 1,000 coins for splitbark gauntlets.

lines.speaker: Wizard Jalarast
lines.text: There you go, enjoy your new armour!

lines.speaker: Wizard Jalarast
lines.text: You need 1 piece of bark, 1 piece of fine cloth and 1,000 coins for splitbark boots.
